CRITICAL: Add array method syntax error fixes to multi-pass fixer

Discovered new syntax error pattern: .some(; instead of .some(
AI was generating invalid array method calls like:
  .some(; .map(; .filter(; etc.

Added two-layer fix:
1. Specific patterns for common array methods (some, map, filter, etc.)
2. General pattern to catch ANY identifier followed by (;

Example fixed patterns:
- .some(; → .some(
- .filter(; → .filter(
- functionName(; → functionName(

Location: server/services/AICodeGenerator.ts:1059-1081
- Fix 0d0: Ultra-aggressive array method fixes
- Fix 0d0b: General pattern for any function/method call

This extends the existing syntax fixer to handle these additional
edge cases that the AI continues to generate despite warnings.
